title: Pastel Pink 16th Birthday Balloons for Girls, 40 Inch Mylar Self Inflating 16 Balloon Number, Big Foil 1 & 6 Helium Number 16 Balloon for Women Birthday Party Decorations Anniversary Decor Supplies
features: 💓 Pastel Pink Number 16 Balloon: Our package included 40 inch number 1 & 6 balloon and 1pcs straw. Simply inflate the balloon using the straw, and you're ready to party! Light pink number foil balloons are the best for girls birthday party decoration.

💓 High Quality & Durabe: Light pink number balloon 16 made of high quality aluminum foil, which is sturdy, durabe and non-toxic, not easy to leak, bright colors. Enough big to worked out great for indoor or outdoor photoshoots, it can lasted long enough to use for next party!

💓 Easy to Inflate & Reusable: Each number balloon comes with straw. Just insert the straw into the inflation port and blow gently or you can also use an air pump. When the party is over, you can insert the straw into the inflation port again and press it with your hands to deflate the balloon. What you need to pay attention to here is: don’t press the balloon too hard. You can reuse it at the next party!

💓 Suitable for all Kinds of Party: The self inflating number big balloon is air or helium supported, are perfect for 16th birthday party, anniversary, wedding, baby shower, graduations, New years, and other theme party. Combine these light pink mylar number balloons with other latex balloons to create any party what you need. I'm sure your party will surprise and impress others.

💓 Warm Tips: Balloons do not need to be inflated to 100%. The best way to keep a balloon is to inflate it to 90%. You can stick number balloons on the wall, window or door,or string with helium balloons. They create the perfect backdrop for any party decor.
description: Product description 40 inch pearl pink number 16 balloon!! Shines beautifully in light pink! Sparkling in the light. Perfect for girls 16th birthday party or other theme party. Specifications: 🎈 High Material: Aluminium Foil 🎈 Color: White / Silver / Pastel Pink / Light Purple / Dark Blue 🎈 Large Size: 40 Inch 🎈 Quantity: 2pcs Number Balloon Numbers Can Be Freely Combined: You can buy different numbers or color combinations to make any number you want, your party will be the most special and the most beautiful, sparkling and impressive How to Inflate Foil Number Balloons: ✨ First: At the bottom of the number balloon, find the self inflating valve port. ✨ Second: Use the straw we prepared or use the air pump, insert it into the inflation port to inflate. (When inflating, be sure to fully expand the balloon before inflating it, otherwise it may be damaged. ) ✨ Third: Air into the balloons must be slow, 90% is enough. After the balloon is inflated, gently press the inflation port with your hand to seal it. ✨ Fourth: Our number balloons are reusable. When the party is over, just insert the straw into the inflation port. Once you feel the air flowing out, you can press it gently with your hand to deflate the balloon. Perfect for Many Occasions Celebration: Birthday Party / Wedding / Anniversary / Graduation / Bridal Shower / Baby Shower / New Year Eve / Big Events / School Class Party / Business Celebrations / Other Theme Party Warm Reminder: 💐 If you don't have helium at home, you can fill it up at your local store. 💐 Number balloons need to be used under adult supervision. A leaky balloon may cause a suffocation hazard. Please keep it away from children and pets. Safety Warning Not for children under 14. Use under adult supervision.
